title: React hook for managing snippets in session state
purpose: Provides React integration for accessing and manipulating snippet data within the current session, including CRUD operations and selection management.

steps.content: Extract snippet state and operations from the session store using shallow equality for performance.
Derive the currently selected snippet from the list of snippets and the selected snippet ID.
Create a memoized function to find a snippet by its ID.
Create a memoized function to check if a snippet exists by its ID.
Create a memoized async function to update a snippet's content via API and update local state.
Return all snippet state and operation methods as a consolidated object.
Search through the list of snippets for one matching the provided ID.
Return the found snippet or undefined if no match exists.
Check if any snippet in the list matches the provided ID.
Return true if a match is found, otherwise return false.
IF no current session is available, exit the function.
Attempt to update the snippet's content via the API using session project and name.
IF the API update succeeds, update the local snippet state with new content and timestamp.
IF the API update fails, log the error and re-throw it.
